field.expression: select SECCION.id_seccion from SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1
field.label: Sección

field.expression: concat(PERSONAL.apellido, ', ', PERSONAL.nombre)
field.label: Apellido
Linea
field.expression: select SECCION.linea_id from SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1

field.label: Categ.
field.expression: (select descripcion from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') /*CONCAT(RIGHT(REPLACE('[__hasta__]', '/', ''), 4), SUBSTRING(REPLACE('[__hasta__]', '/', ''), 3, 2), LEFT(REPLACE('[__hasta__]', '/', ''), 2)) */ order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1)

select tipoliq FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) limit 1
field.label: Tipo Liq.
importe
field.expression: select importe FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.desfec <= hasta and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.idCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) order by CONCEPCONV.desfec DESC limit 1

field.label: Premio
field.expression: select ifnull(premio,0) FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.desfec <= hasta and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = (select CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) order by CONCEPCONV.desfec DESC limit 1

(select SECCION.idMomento FROM SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1)

field.label: Coches
field.expression:
CASE (select SECCION.linea_id from SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) WHEN 1 THEN /*(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PEDCOTIZ where terminacionFinal >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and terminacionFinal <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y')) */
(CASE WHEN (select SECCION.idMomento FROM SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) != 6 THEN
(select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and seccion_id = (select SECCION.idMomento FROM SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1) and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id != 6 )
ELSE
(((select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 2)+ (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 3)+ (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 5)+ (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and orden_control = 999 and seccion_id = 23)) / 4)
END)
/* Herreria2 Chaperia3 Terminacion5 PLastico6*/
WHEN 3 THEN (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and seccion_id = 2 and orden_control = 999 ) WHEN 5 THEN (select COUNT(*) from PROD_CONTROLES join PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id join TURNOSPRODUCCION TUR on TUR.nrofab = nrofab_id and TUR.linea_id != 2 where fecha_control >= STR_TO_DATE('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= STR_TO_DATE('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and seccion_id = 3 and orden_control = 999 ) END

field.label: Faltas

field.expression: select count(*) from FRANCOS_PER F join PERSONAL P on F.IdPersona = P.IdPersona join CALENDAR ON CALENDAR.fecha >= F.fechainicio and CALENDAR.fecha <= (case when F.fechafin = '0000-00-00' then '[__hasta__]' else F.fechafin end) join FRANCOS_CAT FC on FC.idfranco = F.idfranco and FC.tipo = F.tipo where F.IdPersona = '[__idPersona__]' and FC.descuenta = 1 and CALENDAR.fecha >= '[__desde__]' and CALENDAR.fecha <= '[__hasta__]' and dayofweek(CALENDAR.fecha) NOT IN (1,7) and CALENDAR.fecha NOT IN (select idFeriado from FERIADOS)
field.label: No.Imp.Per
%faltas
field.expression: select case when '[__Faltas__]' = '' then 0 else (select FALTAS.porcentaje from FALTAS where FALTAS.faltas = TRUNCATE(([__Faltas__] + 0) - ([__lnip__] + 0), 0)) end

field.label: montoPre
field.expression: select ifnull(montoPremio,0) from PREMIOS where cantidad = '[__coches__]'

field.label: Monto Premio Calidad
field.expression: select ifnull(monto_premiocalidad,0) from PREMIO_CALIDAD where cantidad_premiocalidad = '[__coches__]'

field.label: Seccion.Calidad
field.expression: case when (select idMomentoCalidad FROM SECCION where SECCION.id_seccion = PERSONAL.id_seccion LIMIT 1) != 0 then (select idMomentoCalidad FROM SECCION where SECCION.id_seccion = PERSONAL.id_seccion LIMIT 1) else '' end

field.label: Cant.Cntrl
field.expression: case when (select idMomentoCalidad FROM SECCION where SECCION.id_seccion = PERSONAL.id_seccion LIMIT 1) = 6 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= str_to_date('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= str_to_date('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 6 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 15 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 0 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 25 and no_aplica = 0 )/6 when (select idMomentoCalidad FROM SECCION where SECCION.id_seccion = PERSONAL.id_seccion LIMIT 1) != 0 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= str_to_date('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= str_to_date('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id = idMomentoCalidad and no_aplica = 0) end

field.label: Cant.Cntrl.Obs
field.expression: case when (select idMomentoCalidad FROM SECCION where SECCION.id_seccion = PERSONAL.id_seccion LIMIT 1) = 6 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= str_to_date('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= str_to_date('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 6 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 15 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 0 and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id != 25 and no_conforme = 1 and (controlcausal_id = 2 or controlcausal_id = 3))/6 when (select idMomentoCalidad FROM SECCION where SECCION.id_seccion = PERSONAL.id_seccion LIMIT 1) != 0 then ( select count(*) from PROD_CONTROL_MOVIM left join PROD_CONTROLES on id_prodcontrol = prodcontrol_id where fecha_control >= str_to_date('[__desde__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and fecha_control <= str_to_date('[__hasta__]', '%d/%m/%Y') and PROD_CONTROLES.seccion_id = idMomentoCalidad and no_conforme = 1 and (controlcausal_id = 2 or controlcausal_id = 3)) end

field.label: %Obj.Men
field.expression: select ROUND(option_value + 0, 2) FROM HTXOPTIONS where option_description = 'Objetivo grafico % Defectos por Mes'

field.label: Horas
field.expression:
select
(concat(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)/3600)) as char),':', LPAD(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)%3600)/60)AS CHAR),2,'0'),':', LPAD(CAST((sum(FF.minutos)%60) AS CHAR),2,'0')) + 0) from (select F1.fecha,
@egr:= (SELECT H.egreso from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing:= (SELECT H.ingreso from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing",
@h1:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 0, 1) as "h1", @h2:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 1, 1) as "h2", @h3:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 2, 1) as "h3", @h4:= (select H1.hora from FICHADAS as H1 left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = H1.fecha where H1.tarjeta = (SELECT TJT.tarjeta from PERSONAL_TARJETA as TJT where TJT.idPersona = PERSONAL.idPersona and TJT.fechaDesde <= F1.fecha order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and H1.fecha = F1.fecha and H1.borrado = 0 order by H1.hora limit 3, 1) as "h4",
ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when @h2 > @egr then @egr else @h2 end , case when @h1 < @ing then @ing else @h1 end )), 0) + ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( case when @h4 > @egr then @egr else @h4 end , case when @h4 < @ing then @ing else @h3 end )), 0)
as "minutos"
from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 left join PERSONAL on PERSONAL.id_seccion = [__des2__] and PERSONAL.fechaEgreso = '0000-00-00'
left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= '[__desde__]' and F1.fecha <= '[__hasta__]' and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF

select count(*)*9 from FRANCOS_PER F join PERSONAL P on F.IdPersona = P.IdPersona and P.fechaEgreso = "0000-00-00" join CALENDAR ON CALENDAR.fecha >= F.fechainicio and CALENDAR.fecha <= (case when F.fechafin = '0000-00-00' then '[__hasta__]' else F.fechafin end) join FRANCOS_CAT FC on FC.idfranco = F.idfranco where P.id_seccion = '[__des2__]' and FC.descuenta_grupo = 1 and CALENDAR.fecha >= '[__desde__]' and CALENDAR.fecha <= '[__hasta__]' and dayofweek(CALENDAR.fecha) NOT IN (1,7) and CALENDAR.fecha NOT IN (select idFeriado from FERIADOS)
field.label: No.Imp
Proyeccion
field.expression:
select (concat(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)/3600)) as char),':', LPAD(CAST(FLOOR((sum(FF.minutos)%3600)/60)AS CHAR),2,'0'),':', LPAD(CAST((sum(FF.minutos)%60) AS CHAR),2,'0')) + 0) from
(select F1.fecha,
@egr2:= (SELECT H.egresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "egr", @ing2:= (SELECT H.ingresoPremio from HORARIOHIST as H where H.desdeFecha <= F1.fecha and H.dia = DAYOFWEEK(F1.fecha) order by H.desdeFecha DESC limit 1) as "ing",
ifnull( time_to_sec( timediff( @egr2 , @ing2 )), 0)
as "minutos"
from GEN_CALENDAR as F1 join PERSONAL P on id_seccion = [__des2__] and P.fechaEgreso = "0000-00-00" left join FERIADOS ON FERIADOS.idFeriado = F1.fecha where F1.fecha >= (select (case when fechaDesde < '[__desde__]' then '[__desde__]' else fechaDesde end) from SECCIONHISTORIA where fechaDesde <= '[__hasta__]' and SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = P.IdPersona order by fechaDesde DESC limit 1) and F1.fecha <= (select (case when fechaEgreso = '0000-00-00' then '[__hasta__]' else fechaEgreso end) from PERSONAL where PERSONAL.IdPersona = P.IdPersona) and isnUll(FERIADOS.idFeriado)) as FF

field.label: Hs.Restantes
field.expression: select (('[__proyeccion__]' + 0) - ('[__trabajadas__]' + 0))

field.label: %Obj.Men
field.expression: select ROUND(option_value + 0, 2) FROM HTXOPTIONS where option_description = 'Objetivo grafico Cantidad de Inasistencias x Mes' limit 1

field.label: Monto Premio Calidad
field.expression: select ifnull(monto_premioausentismo,0) from PREMIO_AUSENTISMO where cantidad_premioausentismo = '[__coches__]'

field.label: %Aus.
field.expression: select case when ('[__porcfaltas__]' + 0) = 100 then '0' else ( ROUND(((('[__proyeccion__]' + 0) - ('[__trabajadas__]' + 0) - ('[__licencias_no_imputables__]' + 0)) / ('[__proyeccion__]' + 0)) * 100, 2)) end

field.label: Desc
field.expression: select sum(RHD.importe * RHMOTIVODESC.imputacion) from RHDESCUENTOS as RHD left join RHMOTIVODESC on RHMOTIVODESC.idMotivoDesc = RHD.idMotivoDesc where RHD.fecha >= '[__desde__]' and RHD.fecha <= '[__hasta__]' and RHD.legajo = [__legajo__] and RHD.sobre_extras = 0

field.label: Feriados
field.expression: select SEC_TO_TIME(sum(TIME_TO_SEC(FERIADOS.horas))) from FERIADOS where FERIADOS.idFeriado >= '[__desde__]' and FERIADOS.idFeriado <= '[__hasta__]'
